pilot_config.description: Pilot experiments use 100 samples per feature with seed 42. Timeout 15 minutes per task.

pilots.name: H9 Pilot: Co-occurrence vs. Absorption
pilots.description: Compute p_11 for 26 first-letter features at layer 8 (highest variance layer). Test correlation with absorption rate.
pilots.method: For each feature: generate 100 child prompts, run forward pass, check parent latent activation, compute p_11 = fraction where parent fires. Correlate with absorption_rate.
pilots.pass_criteria: Pearson r > 0.2 with p < 0.10 (directional signal). If r < 0.1, hypothesis is likely null.

pilots.name: H10 Pilot: Random SAE Baseline
pilots.description: Construct random SAE baseline and run absorption detection on 26 first-letter features at layer 8.
pilots.method: Load pretrained SAE, replace decoder with normalized random matrix, freeze. Run Chanin absorption metric on same prompts.
pilots.pass_criteria: Random SAE shows non-zero absorption (>1% mean). If zero, absorption may be purely learned.

pilot_evaluation_criteria.advance: Both H9 and H10 show expected directional results (r > 0.2 for H9, non-zero absorption for H10)
pilot_evaluation_criteria.refine: One pilot shows weak signal but not definitive; consider larger sample size or alternative metric
pilot_evaluation_criteria.pivot: Both pilots null; fall back to cand_h (pure null-result paper without H9-H10)
